name: diagGetAbsolutePosition, diagGetAbsolutePositionResp
title: diagGetAbsolutePosition, diagGetAbsolutePositionResp
syntax: long DiagGetAbsolutePosition( diagRequest request, char parameterPath[] , dword& bytePosOut, dword& bitPosOut, dword& bitConsumptionOut); // form 1
long DiagGetAbsolutePosition( diagResponse response, char parameterPath[] , dword& bytePosOut, dword& bitPosOut, dword& bitConsumptionOut); // form 2
long DiagGetAbsolutePositionResp( diagRequest request, char parameterPath[] , dword& bytePosOut, dword& bitPosOut, dword& bitConsumptionOut); // form 3
long DiagGetAbsolutePosition( diagRequest request, char complexParam[], dword iteration , char leafParameter[], dword& bytePosOut, dword& bitPosOut, dword& bitConsumptionOut); // form 4
long DiagGetAbsolutePosition( diagResponse response, char complexParam[], dword iteration , char leafParameter[], dword& bytePosOut, dword& bitPosOut, dword& bitConsumptionOut); // form 5
long DiagGetAbsolutePositionResp( diagRequest request, char complexParam[], dword iteration , char leafParameter[], dword& bytePosOut, dword& bitPosOut, dword& bitConsumptionOut); // form 6
description: Retrieves the position of a parameter in its primitive. The parameter may be located in a specific iteration in the primitive (forms 4-6) or in the response stored for a request (forms 3 and 6).

parameters.name: request, response
parameters.description: Objekt in which the parameters are located.

parameters.name: parameterPath
parameters.description: Path of the parameter in the primitive (forms 1-3).

parameters.name: iteration
parameters.description: Iteration within the complex parameter that is referenced (forms 4-6).

parameters.name: leafParameter
parameters.description: Leaf parameter within the referenced iteration in the complex parameter (forms 4-6).

parameters.name: bytePosOut
parameters.description: Returns the position of the first byte of the parameter in the primitive.

parameters.name: bitPosOut
parameters.description: Returns the number of the bit in the first byte where the parameter starts.

parameters.name: bitConsumptionOut
parameters.description: Returns the length of the parameter in bits.

return: Path of the parameter in the
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
